explanations.1: The @function decorator tells Dagger (a CI/CD tool) that this method is a special step that can be run in a pipeline.
explanations.2: The 'async' keyword means this function can pause and resume, allowing other tasks to run while it waits—useful for slow operations like linting.
explanations.6: The \033[33m and \033[0m are special codes that make text appear yellow in the terminal; they're ANSI color codes, not actual characters.
